Clean Reading Edition: Dracula

DRACULA

_by_

Bram Stoker

[Illustration: colophon]

NEW YORK

_Publishers_

[_All rights reserved._]

THE COUNTRY LIFE PRESS, GARDEN CITY, N.Y.

TO

MY DEAR FRIEND

HOMMY-BEG

audio_result.voice_identity: A refined female literary narrator: warm, intelligent, calm, expressive, punctuation-aware, emotionally restrained, suitable for Bengali, English, and Hindi.

mastering_plan.silence_trimming: trim leading/trailing silence below -45 dB for longer than 0.35 seconds
